TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Piharatengan to Kiwikosa ci Lin Maosheng == Lin Maosheng, I 1887 miheca masofoc i Taynan maci, o hakasi to no harana' no Columbia daykako i Amilika, o sa'ayaway hakasi to harana' i Taywan. Nao kaemangan ko nikafiyol, mapasera tayra i Dipong a mitilid ​3 ho ko mihecaan ni Lin Maosheng itiya i, mihakelong to akong ci Guo Jingchengan minanam to 'olic a tilid, mapadenga a parena' minanam to Han sifana'. I 1896 mihecaan pasayra to malafonsangay no Dipong minanam to no Dipong a tilid, 1899 miheca micomod i pipasifana'an no mama pitilidan i no Cilokiw a congsi mitilid, nanoya paocoren no 'a'isidan citodong pasifana' to romaroma kapot a mitilid, samasa pangangan han no tao pakaci "Fataday fatac tamdaw (pansience)" han to. ​​Nawhani o katadamaan no ninanaman, mapasera ci Lin Maosheng tayra i Dipong mitilid, ikor malaheci maala ko pitilid i Tokyo teikoku daikako, todong ninanaman o harana' no pasawali, no Yomei no shiso a todong. I 1915 miheca citodong kakeridan no "Takasago seinenkay" ci Lin Maosheng, I 1916 miheca ciniala cingra to Punkaku-shi no Tokyo teikoku daikako, mala o "sarakatay" no Taywa tamdaw i nipikowan no Dipong a Punkaku-shi. Misarocod mikihatiya to Taywan Punkaku yofayof ​I 1921 miheca 10 folad 17 romi'ad patireng to Taywan Punkaku yofayof, o satadamaanay demak a Taywan punkako, caayho ka nga'ay ko sakimalalanaw, saparatoh no itiyaay 1920 mihecaan i, mataelif ko sapatek no tamdaw mikihatiyaay, minakay ci Lin Maosheng tayni Taywan mapatoroh to mitomadaway iing cingra itiya. ​​I 1924 miheca 10 folad 20 romi'ad miteka, o Kiristokiw seinenkay a ngangan ko Taynan ponka yofayof, matahidang ci Lin Maosheng milasingsi saka enem to lipalipay, midemak pasifana' to Seiyosi, padoedo kina 9 ko pipasifana'. Mikoliniw mifalic to iko' mikihatiya mitengil ko imeng no Dipong, o no Taywan a sowal ko sapasifana' ni Lin Maosheng; 1924 mihecaan miteka, ponka yofayof padoedo tolo miheca itira i laloma'an no Lin i Wufeng tasaay lipay no kaciherangan pitilidan a pasifana', cecay miheca ko pasifana' ni Lin Maosheng to lonlika, saka 2, 3 miheca pasifana' to Seiyo punmeisi. Tayra i Amilika no kitakit padafohan minanam to harana' hakasi ​I 1927 miheca, mipili' ci Lin Maosheng to "Kaikai kenkyosa", ono kitakit padafohan tayra i Koronpiya daykako no Amilika, pasikiwiko harana'kaan ci John Dewey aci Monroe a hakasi ko pinanaman. I 1929 miheca 11 folad, pakaala ci Lin Maosheng to harana' hakasi no Koronpiya daykako, o sarakatay tamdaw no Taywan to harana' hakasi cingra, patosokan pikingkiw "itiniay sakowan no Dipong a pitilidan kiwiko no Taywan". ​​Misawad ci Lin Maosheng nifo'otan no Amilika tamdaw, nika paci'eci saan cingra patiko tayni Taywan a dademak: "O malahakasiay i, aitira sa i Koronpiya daykako, o sakapanocay to nisafaloco'an i'ayaw, nika maharateng ko i niyaro'ay no Taywan a tamdamdaw, o maminokanokay aca kako". Patireng to "finawlan sinpon" sakacodah mieses to mikowanay ​Paherek ko lalood, malipahak ko Taywan tamdaw mihamham to "pito'asan kitakit" katayni, nika kaacekan mikelotay ko sifo ni Chen Yi. O nikeridan ni Lin Maosheng a "finawlan sinpon" macodah mipasadak to kaacekan demak no mikowanay sifo, nawhani "finawlan sinpon" pakinali sa mieses to mikowanay, nanoyaan sa mapararaw ko Komintang. ​​Malengat ko 228 a demak i, 3 folad 4 romi'ad tayra ci Lin Maosheng i "pidemakan wiyinhuy" paini to mamoko'ay paini sasowalen, micoracor kao mo'ecelay, patokeden ko iraay nahan. Ikor o patangic no saka tosa a wawa ci Lin Zongyi, tayraay sa iloma' no saka tosa wawa a maro' milimek itira. Mawikid no miri'angay no Komintang a mipatay ​I 1947 miheca 3 folad 11 romi'ad, midotoc to paini no laloma'an, talasekal i Kilong ko sofitay no Nancing sifo itiya i, toya dadaya ira ko fafaloay tamdaw milikot ta mikongkong to loma' micomod, pasadak sa to kowang mitoro' ci Lin Maoshengan pasowal: "Ira ko sasowalen no kakeridan tisowan." Paca'of han ni Lin Maosheng: "Ono mako a pieses, mafana'ay to cingra i." nika hato caay ka filo kana'ayen. Soeso' sa to alofa misadak to safawah pafeli to laloma'an itiya, maala to pasadak, nanoyaan sato awaay patiko. ​​Toya mihecaan, tatodong sa 60 ko mihecaan ni Lin Maosheng, makasasowasowal ko nisawawaan a mitiliday o mamipahemek to 60 kasofacoan itiya. o maanan ko saka kari'ang ni Lin Maosheng hakiya? awaay ko mafana'ay tangasa anini. ​​Padamsoay: SinTaywan hepin kikingkay.
S.PHON: == piħaratəŋan to~u kiwiko~usa ʦi ɾin mao~usħəŋ == ɾin mao~usħəŋ, i **** miħəʦa maso~ufo~uʦ i tajnan maʦi, o~u ħakasi to~u no~u ħaranaʡ no~u ʦo~uɾo~u~umb~b~via ɬ~ɮajkako~u i amiɾika, o~u saʡajawaj ħakasi to~u ħaranaʡ i tajwan. nao~u kaəmaŋan ko~u nikafijo~uɾ, mapasəra tajra i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ ** ħo~u ko~u miħəʦaan ni ɾin mao~usħəŋ itija i, miħakəɾo~uŋ to~u ako~uŋ ʦi *o~u~uo~u *iŋʦħəŋan minanam to~u ʡo~uɾiʦ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, mapaɬ~ɮəŋa a parənaʡ minanam to~u ħan sifanaʡ. i **** miħəʦaan pasajra to~u maɾafo~unsaŋaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ minanam to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, **** miħəʦa miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i pipasifanaʡan no~u mama pitiɾiɬ~ɮan i no~u ʦiɾo~ukiw a ʦo~uŋsi mitiɾiɬ~ɮ, nano~uja pao~uʦo~urən no~u ʡaʡisiɬ~ɮan ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ pasifanaʡ to~u ro~umaro~uma kapo~ut a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ, samasa paŋaŋan ħan no~u tao~u pakaʦi "fataɬ~ɮaj fataʦ tamɬ~ɮaw (pansiənʦə)" ħan to~u. **nawħani o~u kataɬ~ɮamaan no~u ninanaman, mapasəra ʦi ɾin mao~usħəŋ tajra i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ mitiɾiɬ~ɮ, iko~ur maɾaħəʦi maaɾa ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ i to~ukjo~u təiko~uko~u~u ɬ~ɮaikako~u, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ninanaman o~u ħaranaʡ no~u pasawaɾi, no~u jo~uməi no~u sħiso~u a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ. i **** miħəʦa ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u "takasa*o~u səinənkaj" ʦi ɾin mao~usħəŋ, i **** miħəʦa ʦiniaɾa ʦiŋra to~u po~u~unkako~u~u-sħi no~u to~ukjo~u təiko~uko~u~u ɬ~ɮaikako~u, maɾa o~u "sarakataj" no~u tajwa tamɬ~ɮaw i nipiko~uwan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a po~u~unkako~u~u-sħi. misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ mikiħatija to~u tajwan po~u~unkako~u~u jo~ufajo~uf *i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ patirəŋ to~u tajwan po~u~unkako~u~u jo~ufajo~uf, o~u sataɬ~ɮamaanaj ɬ~ɮəmak a tajwan po~u~unkako~u, ʦaajħo~u ka ŋaʡaj ko~u sakimaɾaɾanaw, saparato~uħ no~u itijaaj **** miħəʦaan i, mataəɾif ko~u sapatək no~u tamɬ~ɮaw mikiħatijaaj, minakaj ʦi ɾin mao~usħəŋ tajni tajwan mapato~uro~uħ to~u mito~umaɬ~ɮawaj iiŋ ʦiŋra itija. **i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mitəka, o~u kiristo~ukiw səinənkaj a ŋaŋan ko~u tajnan po~unka jo~ufajo~uf, mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ ʦi ɾin mao~usħəŋ miɾasiŋsi saka ənəm to~u ɾipaɾipaj, miɬ~ɮəmak pasifanaʡ to~u səijo~usi, paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u kina * ko~u pipasifanaʡ. miko~uɾiniw mifaɾiʦ to~u iko~uʡ mikiħatija mitəŋiɾ ko~u iməŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, o~u no~u tajwan a so~uwaɾ ko~u sapasifanaʡ ni ɾin mao~usħəŋ; **** miħəʦaan mitəka, po~unka jo~ufajo~uf paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~uɾo~u miħəʦa itira i ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u ɾin i wo~u~ufəŋ tasaaj ɾipaj no~u kaʦiħəraŋan pitiɾiɬ~ɮan a pasifanaʡ, ʦəʦaj miħəʦa ko~u pasifanaʡ ni ɾin mao~usħəŋ to~u ɾo~unɾika, saka *, * miħəʦa pasifanaʡ to~u səijo~u po~u~unməisi. tajra i amiɾika no~u kitakit paɬ~ɮafo~uħan minanam to~u ħaranaʡ ħakasi *i **** miħəʦa, mipiɾiʡ ʦi ɾin mao~usħəŋ to~u "kaikai kənkjo~usa", o~uno~u kitakit paɬ~ɮafo~uħan tajra i ko~uro~unpija ɬ~ɮajkako~u no~u amiɾika, pasikiwiko~u ħaranaʡkaan ʦi *o~uħn ɬ~ɮəwəj aʦi mo~unro~uə a ħakasi ko~u pinanaman. i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, pakaaɾa ʦi ɾin mao~usħəŋ to~u ħaranaʡ ħakasi no~u ko~uro~unpija ɬ~ɮajkako~u, o~u sarakataj tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tajwan to~u ħaranaʡ ħakasi ʦiŋra, pato~uso~ukan pikiŋkiw "itiniaj sako~uwan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan kiwiko~u no~u tajwan". **misawaɬ~ɮ ʦi ɾin mao~usħəŋ nifo~uʡo~utan no~u amiɾika tamɬ~ɮaw, nika paʦiʡəʦi saan ʦiŋra patiko~u tajni tajwan a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak: "o~u maɾaħakasiaj i, aitira sa i ko~uro~unpija ɬ~ɮajkako~u, o~u sakapano~uʦaj to~u nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan iʡajaw, nika maħaratəŋ ko~u i nijaro~uʡaj no~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw, o~u mamino~ukano~ukaj aʦa kako~u". patirəŋ to~u "finawɾan sinpo~un" sakaʦo~uɬ~ɮaħ miəsəs to~u miko~uwanaj *paħərək ko~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, maɾipaħak ko~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw miħamħam to~u "pito~uʡasan kitakit" katajni, nika kaaʦəkan mikəɾo~utaj ko~u sifo~u ni ʦħən ji. o~u nikəriɬ~ɮan ni ɾin mao~usħəŋ a "finawɾan sinpo~un" maʦo~uɬ~ɮaħ mipasaɬ~ɮak to~u kaaʦəkan ɬ~ɮəmak no~u miko~uwanaj sifo~u, nawħani "finawɾan sinpo~un" pakinaɾi sa miəsəs to~u miko~uwanaj, nano~ujaan sa mapararaw ko~u ko~umintaŋ. **maɾəŋat ko~u *** a ɬ~ɮəmak i, * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ tajra ʦi ɾin mao~usħəŋ i "piɬ~ɮəmakan wijinħo~u~uj" paini to~u mamo~uko~uʡaj paini saso~uwaɾən, miʦo~uraʦo~ur kao~u mo~uʡəʦəɾaj, pato~ukəɬ~ɮən ko~u iraaj naħan. iko~ur o~u pataŋiʦ no~u saka to~usa a wawa ʦi ɾin *o~uŋji, tajraaj sa iɾo~umaʡ no~u saka to~usa wawa a maro~uʡ miɾimək itira. mawikiɬ~ɮ no~u miriʡaŋaj no~u ko~umintaŋ a mipataj *i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u paini no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan, taɾasəkaɾ i kiɾo~uŋ ko~u so~ufitaj no~u nanʦiŋ sifo~u itija i, to~uja ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja ira ko~u fafaɾo~uaj tamɬ~ɮaw miɾiko~ut ta miko~uŋko~uŋ to~u ɾo~umaʡ miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ, pasaɬ~ɮak sa to~u ko~uwaŋ mito~uro~uʡ ʦi ɾin mao~usħəŋan paso~uwaɾ: "ira ko~u saso~uwaɾən no~u kakəriɬ~ɮan tiso~uwan." paʦaʡo~uf ħan ni ɾin mao~usħəŋ: "o~uno~u mako~u a piəsəs, mafanaʡaj to~u ʦiŋra i." nika ħato~u ʦaaj ka fiɾo~u kanaʡajən. so~uəso~uʡ sa to~u aɾo~ufa misaɬ~ɮak to~u safawaħ pafəɾi to~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan itija, maaɾa to~u pasaɬ~ɮak, nano~ujaan sato~u awaaj patiko~u. **to~uja miħəʦaan, tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ sa ** ko~u miħəʦaan ni ɾin mao~usħəŋ, makasaso~uwaso~uwaɾ ko~u nisawawaan a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj o~u mamipaħəmək to~u ** kaso~ufaʦo~uan itija. o~u maanan ko~u saka kariʡaŋ ni ɾin mao~usħəŋ ħakija? awaaj ko~u mafanaʡaj taŋasa anini. **paɬ~ɮamso~uaj: sintajwan ħəpin kikiŋkaj.
S.FORM: == Piharatengan to Kiwikosa ci Lin Maosheng == Lin Maosheng, I 1887 miheca masofoc i Taynan maci, o hakasi to no harana' no Columbia daykako i Amilika, o sa'ayaway hakasi to harana' i Taywan. Nao kaemangan ko nikafiyol, mapasera tayra i Dipong a mitilid ​3 ho ko mihecaan ni Lin Maosheng itiya i, mihakelong to akong ci Guo Jingchengan minanam to 'olic a tilid, mapadenga a parena' minanam to Han sifana'. I 1896 mihecaan pasayra to malafonsangay no Dipong minanam to no Dipong a tilid, 1899 miheca micomod i pipasifana'an no mama pitilidan i no Cilokiw a congsi mitilid, nanoya paocoren no 'a'isidan citodong pasifana' to romaroma kapot a mitilid, samasa pangangan han no tao pakaci "Fataday fatac tamdaw (pansience)" han to. ​​Nawhani o katadamaan no ninanaman, mapasera ci Lin Maosheng tayra i Dipong mitilid, ikor malaheci maala ko pitilid i Tokyo teikoku daikako, todong ninanaman o harana' no pasawali, no Yomei no shiso a todong. I 1915 miheca citodong kakeridan no "Takasago seinenkay" ci Lin Maosheng, I 1916 miheca ciniala cingra to Punkaku-shi no Tokyo teikoku daikako, mala o "sarakatay" no Taywa tamdaw i nipikowan no Dipong a Punkaku-shi. Misarocod mikihatiya to Taywan Punkaku yofayof ​I 1921 miheca 10 folad 17 romi'ad patireng to Taywan Punkaku yofayof, o satadamaanay demak a Taywan punkako, caayho ka nga'ay ko sakimalalanaw, saparatoh no itiyaay 1920 mihecaan i, mataelif ko sapatek no tamdaw mikihatiyaay, minakay ci Lin Maosheng tayni Taywan mapatoroh to mitomadaway iing cingra itiya. ​​I 1924 miheca 10 folad 20 romi'ad miteka, o Kiristokiw seinenkay a ngangan ko Taynan ponka yofayof, matahidang ci Lin Maosheng milasingsi saka enem to lipalipay, midemak pasifana' to Seiyosi, padoedo kina 9 ko pipasifana'. Mikoliniw mifalic to iko' mikihatiya mitengil ko imeng no Dipong, o no Taywan a sowal ko sapasifana' ni Lin Maosheng; 1924 mihecaan miteka, ponka yofayof padoedo tolo miheca itira i laloma'an no Lin i Wufeng tasaay lipay no kaciherangan pitilidan a pasifana', cecay miheca ko pasifana' ni Lin Maosheng to lonlika, saka 2, 3 miheca pasifana' to Seiyo punmeisi. Tayra i Amilika no kitakit padafohan minanam to harana' hakasi ​I 1927 miheca, mipili' ci Lin Maosheng to "Kaikai kenkyosa", ono kitakit padafohan tayra i Koronpiya daykako no Amilika, pasikiwiko harana'kaan ci John Dewey aci Monroe a hakasi ko pinanaman. I 1929 miheca 11 folad, pakaala ci Lin Maosheng to harana' hakasi no Koronpiya daykako, o sarakatay tamdaw no Taywan to harana' hakasi cingra, patosokan pikingkiw "itiniay sakowan no Dipong a pitilidan kiwiko no Taywan". ​​Misawad ci Lin Maosheng nifo'otan no Amilika tamdaw, nika paci'eci saan cingra patiko tayni Taywan a dademak: "O malahakasiay i, aitira sa i Koronpiya daykako, o sakapanocay to nisafaloco'an i'ayaw, nika maharateng ko i niyaro'ay no Taywan a tamdamdaw, o maminokanokay aca kako". Patireng to "finawlan sinpon" sakacodah mieses to mikowanay ​Paherek ko lalood, malipahak ko Taywan tamdaw mihamham to "pito'asan kitakit" katayni, nika kaacekan mikelotay ko sifo ni Chen Yi. O nikeridan ni Lin Maosheng a "finawlan sinpon" macodah mipasadak to kaacekan demak no mikowanay sifo, nawhani "finawlan sinpon" pakinali sa mieses to mikowanay, nanoyaan sa mapararaw ko Komintang. ​​Malengat ko 228 a demak i, 3 folad 4 romi'ad tayra ci Lin Maosheng i "pidemakan wiyinhuy" paini to mamoko'ay paini sasowalen, micoracor kao mo'ecelay, patokeden ko iraay nahan. Ikor o patangic no saka tosa a wawa ci Lin Zongyi, tayraay sa iloma' no saka tosa wawa a maro' milimek itira. Mawikid no miri'angay no Komintang a mipatay ​I 1947 miheca 3 folad 11 romi'ad, midotoc to paini no laloma'an, talasekal i Kilong ko sofitay no Nancing sifo itiya i, toya dadaya ira ko fafaloay tamdaw milikot ta mikongkong to loma' micomod, pasadak sa to kowang mitoro' ci Lin Maoshengan pasowal: "Ira ko sasowalen no kakeridan tisowan." Paca'of han ni Lin Maosheng: "Ono mako a pieses, mafana'ay to cingra i." nika hato caay ka filo kana'ayen. Soeso' sa to alofa misadak to safawah pafeli to laloma'an itiya, maala to pasadak, nanoyaan sato awaay patiko. ​​Toya mihecaan, tatodong sa 60 ko mihecaan ni Lin Maosheng, makasasowasowal ko nisawawaan a mitiliday o mamipahemek to 60 kasofacoan itiya. o maanan ko saka kari'ang ni Lin Maosheng hakiya? awaay ko mafana'ay tangasa anini. ​​Padamsoay: SinTaywan hepin kikingkay.
S.PHON: == piħaratəŋan to~u kiwiko~usa ʦi ɾin mao~usħəŋ == ɾin mao~usħəŋ, i **** miħəʦa maso~ufo~uʦ i tajnan maʦi, o~u ħakasi to~u no~u ħaranaʡ no~u ʦo~uɾo~u~umb~b~via ɬ~ɮajkako~u i amiɾika, o~u saʡajawaj ħakasi to~u ħaranaʡ i tajwan. nao~u kaəmaŋan ko~u nikafijo~uɾ, mapasəra tajra i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ ** ħo~u ko~u miħəʦaan ni ɾin mao~usħəŋ itija i, miħakəɾo~uŋ to~u ako~uŋ ʦi *o~u~uo~u *iŋʦħəŋan minanam to~u ʡo~uɾiʦ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, mapaɬ~ɮəŋa a parənaʡ minanam to~u ħan sifanaʡ. i **** miħəʦaan pasajra to~u maɾafo~unsaŋaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ minanam to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, **** miħəʦa miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i pipasifanaʡan no~u mama pitiɾiɬ~ɮan i no~u ʦiɾo~ukiw a ʦo~uŋsi mitiɾiɬ~ɮ, nano~uja pao~uʦo~urən no~u ʡaʡisiɬ~ɮan ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ pasifanaʡ to~u ro~umaro~uma kapo~ut a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ, samasa paŋaŋan ħan no~u tao~u pakaʦi "fataɬ~ɮaj fataʦ tamɬ~ɮaw (pansiənʦə)" ħan to~u. **nawħani o~u kataɬ~ɮamaan no~u ninanaman, mapasəra ʦi ɾin mao~usħəŋ tajra i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ mitiɾiɬ~ɮ, iko~ur maɾaħəʦi maaɾa ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ i to~ukjo~u təiko~uko~u~u ɬ~ɮaikako~u, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ninanaman o~u ħaranaʡ no~u pasawaɾi, no~u jo~uməi no~u sħiso~u a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ. i **** miħəʦa ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u "takasa*o~u səinənkaj" ʦi ɾin mao~usħəŋ, i **** miħəʦa ʦiniaɾa ʦiŋra to~u po~u~unkako~u~u-sħi no~u to~ukjo~u təiko~uko~u~u ɬ~ɮaikako~u, maɾa o~u "sarakataj" no~u tajwa tamɬ~ɮaw i nipiko~uwan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a po~u~unkako~u~u-sħi. misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ mikiħatija to~u tajwan po~u~unkako~u~u jo~ufajo~uf *i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ patirəŋ to~u tajwan po~u~unkako~u~u jo~ufajo~uf, o~u sataɬ~ɮamaanaj ɬ~ɮəmak a tajwan po~u~unkako~u, ʦaajħo~u ka ŋaʡaj ko~u sakimaɾaɾanaw, saparato~uħ no~u itijaaj **** miħəʦaan i, mataəɾif ko~u sapatək no~u tamɬ~ɮaw mikiħatijaaj, minakaj ʦi ɾin mao~usħəŋ tajni tajwan mapato~uro~uħ to~u mito~umaɬ~ɮawaj iiŋ ʦiŋra itija. **i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mitəka, o~u kiristo~ukiw səinənkaj a ŋaŋan ko~u tajnan po~unka jo~ufajo~uf, mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ ʦi ɾin mao~usħəŋ miɾasiŋsi saka ənəm to~u ɾipaɾipaj, miɬ~ɮəmak pasifanaʡ to~u səijo~usi, paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u kina * ko~u pipasifanaʡ. miko~uɾiniw mifaɾiʦ to~u iko~uʡ mikiħatija mitəŋiɾ ko~u iməŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, o~u no~u tajwan a so~uwaɾ ko~u sapasifanaʡ ni ɾin mao~usħəŋ; **** miħəʦaan mitəka, po~unka jo~ufajo~uf paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~uɾo~u miħəʦa itira i ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u ɾin i wo~u~ufəŋ tasaaj ɾipaj no~u kaʦiħəraŋan pitiɾiɬ~ɮan a pasifanaʡ, ʦəʦaj miħəʦa ko~u pasifanaʡ ni ɾin mao~usħəŋ to~u ɾo~unɾika, saka *, * miħəʦa pasifanaʡ to~u səijo~u po~u~unməisi. tajra i amiɾika no~u kitakit paɬ~ɮafo~uħan minanam to~u ħaranaʡ ħakasi *i **** miħəʦa, mipiɾiʡ ʦi ɾin mao~usħəŋ to~u "kaikai kənkjo~usa", o~uno~u kitakit paɬ~ɮafo~uħan tajra i ko~uro~unpija ɬ~ɮajkako~u no~u amiɾika, pasikiwiko~u ħaranaʡkaan ʦi *o~uħn ɬ~ɮəwəj aʦi mo~unro~uə a ħakasi ko~u pinanaman. i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, pakaaɾa ʦi ɾin mao~usħəŋ to~u ħaranaʡ ħakasi no~u ko~uro~unpija ɬ~ɮajkako~u, o~u sarakataj tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tajwan to~u ħaranaʡ ħakasi ʦiŋra, pato~uso~ukan pikiŋkiw "itiniaj sako~uwan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan kiwiko~u no~u tajwan". **misawaɬ~ɮ ʦi ɾin mao~usħəŋ nifo~uʡo~utan no~u amiɾika tamɬ~ɮaw, nika paʦiʡəʦi saan ʦiŋra patiko~u tajni tajwan a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak: "o~u maɾaħakasiaj i, aitira sa i ko~uro~unpija ɬ~ɮajkako~u, o~u sakapano~uʦaj to~u nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan iʡajaw, nika maħaratəŋ ko~u i nijaro~uʡaj no~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw, o~u mamino~ukano~ukaj aʦa kako~u". patirəŋ to~u "finawɾan sinpo~un" sakaʦo~uɬ~ɮaħ miəsəs to~u miko~uwanaj *paħərək ko~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, maɾipaħak ko~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw miħamħam to~u "pito~uʡasan kitakit" katajni, nika kaaʦəkan mikəɾo~utaj ko~u sifo~u ni ʦħən ji. o~u nikəriɬ~ɮan ni ɾin mao~usħəŋ a "finawɾan sinpo~un" maʦo~uɬ~ɮaħ mipasaɬ~ɮak to~u kaaʦəkan ɬ~ɮəmak no~u miko~uwanaj sifo~u, nawħani "finawɾan sinpo~un" pakinaɾi sa miəsəs to~u miko~uwanaj, nano~ujaan sa mapararaw ko~u ko~umintaŋ. **maɾəŋat ko~u *** a ɬ~ɮəmak i, * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ tajra ʦi ɾin mao~usħəŋ i "piɬ~ɮəmakan wijinħo~u~uj" paini to~u mamo~uko~uʡaj paini saso~uwaɾən, miʦo~uraʦo~ur kao~u mo~uʡəʦəɾaj, pato~ukəɬ~ɮən ko~u iraaj naħan. iko~ur o~u pataŋiʦ no~u saka to~usa a wawa ʦi ɾin *o~uŋji, tajraaj sa iɾo~umaʡ no~u saka to~usa wawa a maro~uʡ miɾimək itira. mawikiɬ~ɮ no~u miriʡaŋaj no~u ko~umintaŋ a mipataj *i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u paini no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan, taɾasəkaɾ i kiɾo~uŋ ko~u so~ufitaj no~u nanʦiŋ sifo~u itija i, to~uja ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja ira ko~u fafaɾo~uaj tamɬ~ɮaw miɾiko~ut ta miko~uŋko~uŋ to~u ɾo~umaʡ miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ, pasaɬ~ɮak sa to~u ko~uwaŋ mito~uro~uʡ ʦi ɾin mao~usħəŋan paso~uwaɾ: "ira ko~u saso~uwaɾən no~u kakəriɬ~ɮan tiso~uwan." paʦaʡo~uf ħan ni ɾin mao~usħəŋ: "o~uno~u mako~u a piəsəs, mafanaʡaj to~u ʦiŋra i." nika ħato~u ʦaaj ka fiɾo~u kanaʡajən. so~uəso~uʡ sa to~u aɾo~ufa misaɬ~ɮak to~u safawaħ pafəɾi to~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan itija, maaɾa to~u pasaɬ~ɮak, nano~ujaan sato~u awaaj patiko~u. **to~uja miħəʦaan, tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ sa ** ko~u miħəʦaan ni ɾin mao~usħəŋ, makasaso~uwaso~uwaɾ ko~u nisawawaan a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj o~u mamipaħəmək to~u ** kaso~ufaʦo~uan itija. o~u maanan ko~u saka kariʡaŋ ni ɾin mao~usħəŋ ħakija? awaaj ko~u mafanaʡaj taŋasa anini. **paɬ~ɮamso~uaj: sintajwan ħəpin kikiŋkaj.
